case_title: SALOMON HERNANDEZ VS. CHRISTOPHER MICHAEL GRENDAHL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HERNANDEZ, SALOMON AS TO DEFENDANT GRENDAHL, CHRISTOPHER MICHAEL AN INDIVIDUAL DBA B & E RESTORATION AND CONSTRUCTION AKA B AND D RESTORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HERNANDEZ, SALOMON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GRENDAHL, CHRISTOPHER MICHAEL AN INDIVIDUAL DBA B & E RESTORATION AND CONSTRUCTION AKA B AND D RESTORATION $42,796.27 PRINCIPAL, $450.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $43,246.27, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
